title: Athens balances ‘indispensable’ experience with political costs of its Saudi mission
summary_full: Greece's prime minister has stressed the deployment of assets in Saudi Aranbia is meant "protect critical energy infrastructure such as Saudi refineries" and in no way constitutes involvment in the regional conflict.
summary_public: Greece's prime minister has stressed the deployment of assets in Saudi Aranbia is meant "protect critical energy infrastructure such as Saudi refineries" and in no way constitutes involvment in the regional conflict.
